prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Iron Kingdoms / Full Metal Fantasy inspired steampunk military-fantasy atlas for the terrain type dual_continent.
Scene/backdrop: two major western Immoren-style continents separated by uneven iron-grey seas and narrow straits, mechanikal factory-cities, steam-vented ruins, blighted marshes, warjack assembly ports, arcane storm fronts, rival kingdoms, fortified railways, coal basins, river trade cities, alchemist roads and mercenary war zones.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated steampunk fantasy atlas, aged parchment with brass-and-iron mechanikal overlay, steam and magic intertwined, warjack smoke plumes, arcane lightning, industrial military campaign-map mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map, asymmetric continents of different sizes; the sea separation is diagonal and S-shaped with C-shaped gulfs, L-shaped channels and jagged straits, not a simple vertical divider; include brass compass rose, riveted border, rail lines, factory icons, fortress markers, arcane storm symbols and national border shading without readable text.
Geography constraints: realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, capes, broken shores, curved coasts, fjords, deltas, smoky estuaries, inland seas and varied landforms; span snowbound northlands, temperate river kingdoms, blighted swamps, mountain holds, industrial basins, forests, harbors and arcane-scorched wastelands.
Avoid: clean heroic fantasy, mirrored continents, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
